questions.question: Describe the key differences between a 'Waterfall' and an 'Agile' software development approach. (7 hours)
What is the main purpose of a 'Use Case Diagram' in software engineering? (7 hours)
questions.hint: A Use Case Diagram is a type of software diagram used to represent the interactions between a system and its users.

questions.question: What are the three main Phases in the Project Management Process Group, as outlined in PMBOK Guide? (7 hours)
